theme_and_archetype.description: A developer-grade, brutalist, precision-oriented UI. Inspired by Vercel/Linear but pushed further with 'exposed skeleton' grid borders, high-contrast monochrome tones, and functional accent colors to signal blockers and architecture components. It avoids generic tech gradients in favor of sharp, definitive styling.

rules: Use JetBrains Mono for all code snippets, AWS service names, OSI layers, IP addresses, and cost calculations.
Never use Inter for headings. Keep headings stark and tightly tracked.
Avoid bold body text unless it's a critical label; use weight contrast instead.
Use the 'Tinted Grey' rule: Zinc palette is preferred over raw Grays to maintain a subtle cool temperature.
Strict monochrome usage: 95% of the UI should be black, white, and zinc. Color exists ONLY for functional status (red = blocker/error, green = healthy, amber = AWS service/cost alert).
Borders must be sharp (1px solid). No soft drop shadows.

layout_and_spacing.system: Tailwind standard scale, utilizing generous spacing (p-6, p-8) to prevent density fatigue in dense technical documents.

patterns.dashboard_grid: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Dense and structured. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Exposed grid borders (border-r border-b border-zinc-800).
patterns.lld_viewer_split: Asymmetric 2-pane layout. Left pane (Diagram Viewer): col-span-5. Right pane (LLD Document Reader): col-span-7. Left pane has a subtle dot-grid background.

rules: No rounded corners greater than rounded-md (6px) to maintain the brutalist, architectural feel.
Use border-collapse techniques to create the 'exposed skeleton' grid look on tables and feature lists.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Flat background (zinc-900), 1px solid border (zinc-800), absolutely no shadow. Hover state: border becomes zinc-600.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Square or rounded-sm. Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 hover:border-zinc-500 hover:text-white.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.pills_and_tags: Used for AWS services. font-mono text-xs border border-zinc-700 bg-zinc-900/50 px-2 py-1.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.diagram_viewer: Must have a 'Terminal/Grid' retro-futuristic backdrop. A repeating SVG dot pattern or grid lines on pure black to simulate a canvas.

navigation.header: Sticky header (z-50) using the 'Crystal Glass' variant (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-800). Must contain Logo, Project Name, and Export CTA.
navigation.sidebar: Collapsible left sidebar for the LLD Table of Contents (TOC). Uses strict progressive disclosure. Links must be small, tightly spaced, and hover to white.

components.upload_zone: Large dotted/dashed border area (border-zinc-700). Must include an icon, clear instructions, and support drag-and-drop. Hover state increases border brightness to zinc-400.
components.live_progress: Terminal-style streaming text window while Claude generates the LLD. JetBrains Mono, text-sm, text-zinc-400 with the latest line in text-white.
components.markdown_viewer: Utilize `prose prose-invert`. Customize prose styles: prose-headings:font-chivo prose-a:text-white prose-a:underline prose-a:decoration-zinc-700 prose-pre:bg-zinc-900 prose-pre:border prose-pre:border-zinc-800.
components.aws_service_pills: Interactive tokens within the text. Clicking them should highlight the corresponding node in the Draw.io diagram view.
components.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for a clean, sharp, duotone/regular weight look that fits developer tools.

interactions_and_motion.transitions: Fast and snappy. `transition-all duration-150 ease-out`. No slow, sweeping animations.
interactions_and_motion.diagram_sync: Clicking a node in the diagram must trigger a smooth scroll (`scroll-behavior: smooth`) to the relevant OSI/Networking/IAM section in the Markdown viewer.
interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must shift contrast. E.g., text-zinc-400 -> text-white.

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="upload-xml-button"`, `data-testid="export-pdf-cta"`).
accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for all text. The Zinc 400 on Zinc 950 provides sufficient contrast for secondary text.

background_texture.description: Dark monochrome matrix texture. Use as a very low opacity (5-10%) overlay in the Hero or Empty States to give a raw data feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme and Swiss & High-Contrast archetype. Do not introduce stray colors like purple or teal.
Implement the UI using raw Tailwind HTML for layout structures, but utilize customized Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (Dropdowns, Tabs, Dialogs).
Use `framer-motion` only for micro-interactions (like the live streaming progress bar or tab switching). Keep it minimal.
The Diagram viewer MUST be sticky on the left while the document scrolls on the right.
Use `react-markdown` or similar to render the LLD, ensuring the custom prose classes are applied.
Generate realistic mock data if the backend generation isn't hooked up yet.
Ensure all buttons and inputs have the `data-testid` attribute.
